creator: nosuzuki@e-mail.ne.jp
text:
I found a new version of PPP program, PPxP. I have attached a patch file
for previous version of PPxP port. The previous  version of it is in
<URL:ftp://ftp.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD/incoming/ppxp-0.98070721.tar.gz>

Thank you.
-- 
Norio Suzuki
e-mail: nosuzuki@e-mail.ne.jp
